title: Amazon Athena Query Execution
description: Schema defining the structure of an Amazon Athena query execution resource, including query string, execution context, result configuration, work group settings, and execution status.

QueryExecutionId.description: The unique identifier for each query execution.

QueryString.description: The SQL query statements which the query execution ran.

StatementType.description: The type of query statement that was run.

WorkGroup.description: The name of the workgroup in which the query ran.

ExecutionParameters.description: A list of values for the parameters in a query.

SubstatementType.description: The kind of query statement that was run.

ResultConfiguration.description: The location in Amazon S3 where query results are stored and the encryption option, if any, used for query results.

OutputLocation.description: The location in Amazon S3 where your query results are stored.

EncryptionOption.description: The type of server-side encryption used.

KmsKey.description: The KMS key ARN or ID for SSE_KMS and CSE_KMS encryption.

ExpectedBucketOwner.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that you expect to be the owner of the Amazon S3 bucket.

QueryExecutionContext.description: The database and data catalog context for the query execution.

Database.description: The name of the database used in the query execution.

Catalog.description: The name of the data catalog used in the query execution.

QueryExecutionStatus.description: The status of a query execution.

State.description: The state of the query execution.

StateChangeReason.description: Further detail about the status of the query.

SubmissionDateTime.description: The date and time that the query was submitted.

CompletionDateTime.description: The date and time that the query completed.

EngineExecutionTimeInMillis.description: The number of milliseconds that the query took to execute.

DataScannedInBytes.description: The number of bytes in the data that was queried.

DataManifestLocation.description: The location and file name of a data manifest file.

EngineVersion.description: The Athena engine version for running queries.

SelectedEngineVersion.description: The engine version requested by the user.

EffectiveEngineVersion.description: The engine version that ran the query.
